prompts.subject: Lattice Stable Pendant
prompts.loreSummary: Lattice Stable Pendant. Rift Ascendant is modern supernatural urban fantasy in the early normalized Rift Age; the material world is functional, commercial, Bureau-regulated, and media-aware. A simple pendant that becomes anything but, once attuned. Small enough to forget. Big enough to matter when it counts. standard

prompts.subject: Abyssal Spear
prompts.loreSummary: Abyssal Spear. Rift Ascendant is modern supernatural urban fantasy in the early normalized Rift Age; the material world is functional, commercial, Bureau-regulated, and media-aware. As an action, force all creatures within a 15-ft. cone to make a DC 13 Agility save or take 2d6 damage of this weapon's type. Not pretty. Not elegant. Effective. aetheric

prompts.subject: Umbral Kite Shield
prompts.loreSummary: Umbral Kite Shield. Rift Ascendant is modern supernatural urban fantasy in the early normalized Rift Age; the material world is functional, commercial, Bureau-regulated, and media-aware. As an action, mark a creature within 60 ft. for 1 minute. Attacks against the marked creature deal +1d6 damage of this item's theme. What's left of you after it's done its job is what you started with. crimson
